copyrightBoundary: Use internalized facts, section names, and local comparison fields only; do not copy third-party prose or host-specific shell hooks into local skills.

refreshMetadata.refreshCommand: Update from approved local research notes and Supervibe artifacts only.
refreshMetadata.stalenessPolicy: Mark the fixture stale when local validators, skill anatomy, or approved baseline research no longer derive every required anatomy heading.

categories.localTreatment: Keep as optional UI evidence; require a local reviewer or validator before gating.
Map to Supervibe agent routing and receipt policy without importing upstream host hooks.
Use as advisory optimization evidence unless a task or reviewer makes performance a gate.
Treat as regulated-risk evidence that must stay host-neutral and receipt-backed.
Use to strengthen verification contracts while preserving local test commands.

referencePackModel.localPolicy: Keep long checklists and templates in references/ and link from SKILL.md only when needed.

hookPortabilityNotes.localTreatment: Translate behavior into Supervibe policy, receipts, or validators before use.
Do not copy shell hooks; document sandbox, secrets, rollback, and failure behavior for any local automation.
Preserve the intent as skill anatomy or reviewer guidance, not as provider-specific command aliases.

hookPortabilityConstraints: Treat third-party host setup as adapter evidence, not a local implementation contract.
Do not copy shell hooks directly; model behavior as host-neutral lifecycle policy, validators, or Supervibe receipts.
Any hook-like automation must document sandbox, secrets, rollback, and non-interactive failure behavior.
